div.p: Kernel-level buffer reallocation with Allocate-Copy-Swap-Free pattern. IOC Command: MYDEVICE_IOC_RESIZE | _IOW('k', 0, unsigned long)
Status: new_buf points to fresh 8KB zeroed slab. Note: Allocation occurs before mutex to minimize latency.
Critical section begins. If interrupted, kfree(new_buf) and exit.
old_data copied to start of new_buf.
Old pointer released, new pointer installed.

g.text: kzalloc Fails (-ENOMEM): Return immediately. kernel_buffer remains untouched.
Mutex Interrupted (-ERESTARTSYS): kfree(new_buf) before return to prevent leak.
SAFETY INVARIANT: Never kfree(kernel_buffer) until new_buf is ready for swap.
